doc.purpose: Ryujinx controller profile content (the Deck-proven golden) as data: the single SDL2 controller document Ryujinx loads for the Steam virtual gamepad, substituted by RyujinxEmitter. Variables: ${controller_identity} the steam_input.json device identity (device_identities.ryujinx_controller_id), ${emulator_name} the contract name.
doc.grammar: Ryujinx's own profile schema: joycon section names, SDL button tokens, ProController identity. The Switch face-button letters cross over from the SDL/Xbox layout on purpose (Switch X = SDL Y, Switch B = SDL A, ...); motion stays off per Deck policy (steam_input.json controller doc - no gyro). The file name is the display name Steam's SDL2 virtual gamepad reports inside the flatpak; Ryujinx binds profiles to controllers by that name.

lines: {"left_joycon_stick": {"joystick": "Left", "invert_stick_x": false, "invert_stick_y": false, "stick_button": "LeftStick"}, "right_joycon_stick": {"joystick": "Right", "invert_stick_x": false, "invert_stick_y": false, "stick_button": "RightStick"}, "motion": {"slot": 0, "alt_slot": 0, "mirror_input": false, "motion_backend": "CemuHook", "sensitivity": 100, "gyro_deadzone": 1, "enable_motion": false}, "rumble": {"strong_rumble": 1, "weak_rumble": 1, "enable_rumble": true}, "left_joycon": {"button_minus": "Back", "button_l": "LeftShoulder", "button_zl": "LeftTrigger", "dpad_up": "DpadUp", "dpad_down": "DpadDown", "dpad_left": "DpadLeft", "dpad_right": "DpadRight"}, "right_joycon": {"button_plus": "Start", "button_r": "RightShoulder", "button_zr": "RightTrigger", "button_x": "Y", "button_b": "A", "button_y": "X", "button_a": "B"}, "version": 1, "backend": "GamepadSDL2", "id": "${controller_identity}", "controller_type": "ProController", "player_index": "Player1"}
